query:
UPDATE requests
            SET state = 'failed',
                error = 'test error',
                failed_at = NOW(),
                retry_attempt = 3,
                daemon_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001',
                claimed_at = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour',
                started_at = NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
            WHERE batch_id = $1
            AND id IN (
                SELECT id FROM requests WHERE batch_id = $1 ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 2
            )
